rationale: P140 showed a large jump from P100 F1 0.295190 to P140 F1 0.525029 with inflation 1.055024. This means symbol is not exhausted; the remaining bottleneck is recall/center recovery after aggressive cleanup.

north_star_targets.not_required: Do not require F1 >= 0.95 for detector metrics; focus on credible, defensible improvement.

recovery_lanes.name: materialize_and_officially_validate_p140
recovery_lanes.goal: Make P140 an actual overlay JSONL and rerun the official P101 evaluator. This is mandatory before any manuscript claim.
recovery_lanes.why_it_can_help: Confirms that the sweep metric is not an artifact of a custom evaluator.
recovery_lanes.target: official F1 >=0.50, inflation <=1.20, delta from sweep <=0.02 F1

recovery_lanes.name: recall_backfill_after_p140_cleanup
recovery_lanes.goal: Starting from P140 clean predictions, add back high-recall candidates only where they do not duplicate selected boxes.
recovery_lanes.why_it_can_help: P140 precision/inflation are strong but recall/center dropped. A second-stage backfill can recover missed symbols while preserving low inflation.
methods: two-tier thresholds: strict core + loose backfill

recovery_lanes.name: per_label_error_bucket_rescue
recovery_lanes.goal: Split symbol metrics by predicted label and area bucket, then tune thresholds/NMS separately for easy vs hard labels.
recovery_lanes.why_it_can_help: P140 uses label thresholds but not label-specific objectives. Some classes may tolerate lower thresholds while noisy labels need stricter NMS.
recovery_lanes.target: Improve recall without losing more than 0.03 precision; identify 2-3 easy labels for main-table ablation.

recovery_lanes.name: box_calibration_and_merge_rescue
recovery_lanes.goal: Apply existing symbol box calibration/refiner scripts to P140 candidates, then rerun target-level eval.
recovery_lanes.why_it_can_help: Low center and IoU may reflect duplicate/tile boundary boxes and loose boxes, not only missed detections. Existing repo has multiple symbol refiner/calibration scripts.
recovery_lanes.target: F1 +0.03 over P140 or center +0.05 without inflation increase

recovery_lanes.name: off_mount_full_nms_and_search
recovery_lanes.goal: Copy 74-row overlay and eval targets to local temp/off-mount storage and run a wider NMS/threshold/backfill search without SSHFS slowness.
recovery_lanes.why_it_can_help: P140 slow NMS eventually produced the strongest result. Wider search may find another jump.
recovery_lanes.target: Find policy exceeding P140 F1 by >=0.03 or center by >=0.05

recovery_lanes.name: subset_generalization_guardrail
recovery_lanes.goal: Check P140/P155 policies against any available P116/P119 expanded subset artifacts before making them main claims.
recovery_lanes.why_it_can_help: Prevents overfitting to 74-row overlay subset and strengthens SCI story.
recovery_lanes.target: No catastrophic collapse; preserve lower inflation than baseline

execution_order: P155E off-mount wide search if P155B/C show promise
P156 manuscript/table update only after validated symbol gains
paper_policy: Do not freeze paper. Symbol is now the main metric-recovery story. Only validated P155 outputs can update manuscript v0.5; P140 remains current safe symbol result until P155A confirms it.
stop_gates: If P155A fails official validation, fix materialization/evaluator before any further symbol claims.
If P155B/C cannot improve F1 by >=0.02 or center by >=0.03, move to box calibration rather than endless threshold search.
If wider search only improves on the same 74 rows but no generalization artifact exists, keep claim explicitly subset-bound.
